assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain every required section. Task 1: Repository (line 1), Target Branch (line 4), Description (line 7), Files to Create (line 10), Files to Modify (line 13), Implementation Notes (line 16), Acceptance Criteria (line 27), Test Requirements (line 34). Tasks 2-5 similarly contain all required sections. Each task has at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 5 task files: task-1-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-advisory-severity-aggregation-service.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation-advisory-ingestion.md, task-5-advisory-summary-integration-tests.md. 5 is between 3 and 10 inclusive.

All 5 task files have '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend': task-1 line 2, task-2 line 2, task-3 line 2, task-4 line 2, task-5 line 2. The impact map is also scoped to '## trustify-backend'.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: no dependencies. Task 2: 'Depends on: Task 1' (line 43). Task 3: 'Depends on: Task 2' (line 51). Task 4: 'Depends on: Task 3' (line 37). Task 5: 'Depends on: Task 3' (line 47). The dependency graph is: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5}. This is a directed acyclic graph with no cycles.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All paths verified against repo-backend.md directory tree: Task 1 creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_severity_summary.rs (parent dir exists at line 41), modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41). Task 2 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46). Task 3 creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (parent at line 48), modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48). Task 4 modifies modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83). Task 5 modifies tests/api/sbom.rs (line 111).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact map in impact-map.md contains 6 bullet points, all specific: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct to the SBOM model layer (modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/)', 'Add severity aggregation query method to SbomService in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs that joins sbom_advisory with advisory and groups by severity', 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler...with 5-minute cache-control header', 'Add optional ?threshold query parameter', 'Add cache invalidation hook in advisory ingestion pipeline (modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs)', 'Add integration tests for the advisory-summary endpoint in tests/api/sbom.rs covering: successful aggregation, 404 for unknown SBOM, deduplication by advisory ID, threshold filtering, and cache behavior'. Each references specific file paths, method names, API routes, or test scenarios.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks have a '## Repository' section containing exactly one repository name: 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain: '## Target Branch' (set to 'main'), '## Description' (with detailed content), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items). Verified in all task files.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Every modified file path exists in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), tests/api/sbom.rs (line 111). Created files (advisory_severity_summary.rs, advisory_summary.rs) are in existing directories from the manifest. No invented paths.

assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files have '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': task-1 line 4-5, task-2 line 4-5, task-3 line 4-5, task-4 line 4-5, task-5 line 4-5.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' (or sha256-adf). The digest is computed by re-fetching the description from the API and running scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain valid digest lines: Task 1: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:c097576f47e0dcad418d20a7a2f44670b28215992d89e0e5e28c372356567d04' (64 hex chars). Task 2: 'sha256-md:07eb40ba4264c76eec1c6d3d87772899463f61fba509cad077a4392cc3bac52b' (64 hex chars). Task 3: 'sha256-md:5285a132040ce1f725a3d8b36eed916ddab7d29f90766faab5a5fec98ff61ebe' (64 hex chars). Task 4: 'sha256-md:9f0abeafbef32b4d7164ffdd183914073c4379cbf9e256a01bf607b6be122fd1' (64 hex chars). Task 5: 'sha256-md:1f746dec1513a9a89da732f92b27e59034bd7719d67981d6c878dd678cdd9d0e' (64 hex chars). All are exactly 64 lowercase hexadecimal characters, not placeholders or abbreviated values.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: No conventions are annotated as 'Not applicable' (grep confirms zero matches), which is correct. However, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md line 26 contains a convention reference 'Per Key Conventions §Caching: use tower-http caching middleware to set Cache-Control: max-age=300 (5 minutes) on the response. Reference the existing caching configuration in endpoint route builders for the established pattern.' — this convention does NOT include the prescribed 'Applies: task modifies/creates <file> matching the convention's <scope>' rationale format. Instead it uses free-form prose ('Reference the existing caching configuration in endpoint route builders for the established pattern'). Per convention-applicability-rules.md, all included conventions must have a rationale in the prescribed format.
